Concerns around shady looking playlist

Sorry.. big post incoming. I'm pretty concerned I've been added to a bogus playlist that fakes streams. To clarify I never contacted these people and never saw them listed on any curator web

To me this is a perfect example of why Spotify is getting worse and worse. Why do I not have the option to dislike, remove, or hide all of these non-relevant suggestions to improve my algorithm and taste profile?!

But there's no way for me to tell Spotify
